description: Literary and scholarly layer labels used in reverse tracing.

layers.label: 원어 원전
layers.description: Greek, Latin, French, German, English, Italian, Classical Chinese, or other source-language primary text.

layers.label: 고전적 번역본
layers.description: Historically influential translation, such as old English, Latin translation, Jowett Plato, or older French/German editions.

layers.label: 현대 번역본
layers.description: Modern English/Korean/French/German translation of a primary text.

layers.label: 주석·전통 해석
layers.description: Commentary, scholia, gloss, scholastic interpretation, or classical exegetical tradition.

layers.label: 후대 학자 해석
layers.description: Later scholar's paraphrase, reception, citation, or conceptual explanation.

layers.label: 현대 해설·2차 문헌
layers.description: Textbook, lecture note, blog, encyclopedia, article, or course summary.

layers.label: 단서 자료
layers.description: Useful clue source that should not be treated as final citation evidence.

layers.label: 층위 불명
layers.description: Insufficient evidence to classify the document layer.
